targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(value_num) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric_name) value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_open_connections%' ORDER BY metric_name, time DESC) t
SELECT MAX(value_num) FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_config_reloads_total%'

WITH bounds AS (SELECT MIN(value_num) AS min_v, MAX(value_num) AS max_v FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total%' AND $__timeFilter(time)) SELECT COALESCE(max_v - min_v, 0) FROM bounds

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT substring(metric_name FROM 'entrypoint="([^"]+)"')) FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total%' AND time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes'

WITH series AS (SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS t, COALESCE(substring(metric_name FROM 'entrypoint="([^"]+)"'), 'unknown') AS entrypoint, SUM(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total%' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT t AS time, entrypoint AS metric, GREATEST(value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY entrypoint ORDER BY t), 0) / 60.0 AS value FROM series ORDER BY t

panels.title: HTTP requests/s by status code (rate over 1m)

targets.rawSql: WITH series AS (SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS t, COALESCE(substring(metric_name FROM 'code="([^"]+)"'), 'unknown') AS code, SUM(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total%' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT t AS time, code AS metric, GREATEST(value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY code ORDER BY t), 0) / 60.0 AS value FROM series ORDER BY t

WITH series AS (SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS t, COALESCE(substring(metric_name FROM 'method="([^"]+)"'), 'unknown') AS method, SUM(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_entrypoint_requests_total%' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT t AS time, method AS metric, GREATEST(value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY method ORDER BY t), 0) / 60.0 AS value FROM series ORDER BY t

WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(time) AS max_t FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%') SELECT COALESCE(substring(m.metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"'), '?') AS service, COALESCE(substring(m.metric_name FROM 'code="([^"]+)"'), '?') AS code, MAX(m.value_num) AS requests_total FROM metrics m, last l WHERE m.resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND m.metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND m.time >= l.max_t - interval '60 seconds' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY requests_total DESC LIMIT 25
